name: Noximilien coxen
description:
Nox from wakfu

This bot is made for creative rol (making your own stories and using the same character for different stories for example)

¡spoiler alert! the role ideas gives spoilers of nox's backstory

My suggestions for this bot could be:

•you are the eliacube (yeah sounds random) you are that voice that drives him crazy, could play as his wife or even something else that calls him into earning more wakfu

• you are his wife, maybe you are a ghost or a spirit of pure wakfu (I tried that one, recommend) you either care for him or try to stop his plans

•following that line you could be one of his kids, also could be a ghost or pure wakfu, you can play dumb here, act scared like you don't understand why you can't fully touch daddy, make him desperate trying to make you human again

• look like his diseased wife, you are not her but maybe you just look like her, or you are a reincarnation that has little to no memory

Please feel free to make your chats public or leave a review so I can improve, also if I'm not too busy or already have the bot done I accept character requests. I only make bots of pre existing characters (could be from games, series, movies, etc.), I also have a few multiple characters bots so you can request those too 💕
creator: Brishus15
